title: Civix
body:
🏙️ **Civix — Build the Future, Block by Block**

Civix is a modern industrial city–building Minecraft modpack focused on automation, infrastructure, and collaborative progression. Design massive factories, power smart cities, automate entire supply chains, and turn your world into a living metropolis.

Whether you’re constructing skyscrapers, running rail networks, or managing industrial districts, Civix gives you the tools to create a true modern civilization inside Minecraft.

⚙️ **Core Features**

🏗️ **Industrial Automation**
Build realistic factories with mechanical power, conveyors, multiblock machines, and advanced processing systems.

🏙️ **Modern City Building**
Create detailed urban environments using modern architecture blocks, furniture, lighting, bridges, and decorative elements.

🚆 **Infrastructure & Transport**
Design rail systems, logistics networks, and large-scale item movement to connect your city districts.

🔋 **Power & Technology**
Generate energy through multiple systems and distribute it across your city to run machines, storage networks, and utilities.

📦 **Smart Storage & Logistics**
Manage massive inventories with digital storage, automated sorting, and production pipelines.

👥 **Multiplayer Ready**
Party/team support allows players to work together on shared cities, factories, and progression — perfect for RP or community servers.

🧠 **Progression-Based Gameplay**
Advance from basic industry to fully automated smart cities with layered tech progression and expanding capabilities.

🎯 **Designed For**

Industrial & automation lovers

City builders and modern architects

Multiplayer collaboration & RP servers

Players who enjoy long-term progression

Tech-focused Minecraft experiences

🌆 **Your World. Your City. Your Civilization.**

From humble workshops to sprawling megacities, Civix is about growth, planning, and engineering on a massive scale.

Build roads. Power grids. Train lines. Factories. Neighborhoods.

Welcome to Civix.
